title: Luxury Product Alchemy AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image luxury jewelry campaign transformation for Image 1: uploaded emerald ring product photo, built around rainforest jewel alchemy with the ring emerging from a wet sculptural leaf. Subject: Image 1: uploaded emerald ring product photo remains the exact preserved product hero: keep its design, shape, proportions, gemstone arrangement, metal tone, craftsmanship, setting, texture, and product identity unchanged. Scene: wet black stone with organic leaf forms and subtle atmospheric glow forms the premium campaign world around the product, with glossy leaves, dew, dark stone, and soft water reflections framing the jewelry without covering or redesigning it. Composition: Fixed product-first luxury advertising composition: the uploaded jewelry is the absolute visual hero, placed with bold artistic framing, varied elevated environment, tactile supporting elements, and clean premium negative space. Signature Elements: Exact uploaded jewelry reference, bold artistic supporting scene, tactile natural framing, cinematic luxury product lighting, unique campaign concept per generation, and premium editorial finish. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Luxury palette derived from the preserved product and chosen environment: gemstone color remains faithful, metal tone stays accurate, supporting materials add refined contrast, and highlights stay premium rather than flashy. Lighting: Cinematic product lighting with precise gemstone sparkle, controlled metal reflections, soft atmospheric glow, tactile material highlights, and shadow depth that keeps the jewelry readable. Camera: High-end macro or close product campaign camera with sharp jewelry detail, believable depth of field, product-first focus, and varied but controlled angle that never distorts the preserved design. Materials: Preserved jewelry craftsmanship plus tactile natural or luxury surfaces such as leaf, stone, silk, shell, glass, dew, sand, bark, or petals rendered with premium physical texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Luxury Product Alchemy Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image luxury jewelry campaign transformation for Image 1: uploaded emerald ring product photo, built around moonlit silk tide luxury campaign with the ring floating over folds of cream silk. Subject: Image 1: uploaded emerald ring product photo remains the exact preserved product hero: keep its design, shape, proportions, gemstone arrangement, metal tone, craftsmanship, setting, texture, and product identity unchanged. Scene: cream silk and sculptural shell forms with shallow depth of field forms the premium campaign world around the product, with silk folds, shell fragments, pale sand texture, and glass reflections framing the jewelry without covering or redesigning it. Composition: Fixed product-first luxury advertising composition: the uploaded jewelry is the absolute visual hero, placed with bold artistic framing, varied elevated environment, tactile supporting elements, and clean premium negative space. Signature Elements: Exact uploaded jewelry reference, bold artistic supporting scene, tactile natural framing, cinematic luxury product lighting, unique campaign concept per generation, and premium editorial finish. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Luxury palette derived from the preserved product and chosen environment: gemstone color remains faithful, metal tone stays accurate, supporting materials add refined contrast, and highlights stay premium rather than flashy. Lighting: Cinematic product lighting with precise gemstone sparkle, controlled metal reflections, soft atmospheric glow, tactile material highlights, and shadow depth that keeps the jewelry readable. Camera: High-end macro or close product campaign camera with sharp jewelry detail, believable depth of field, product-first focus, and varied but controlled angle that never distorts the preserved design. Materials: Preserved jewelry craftsmanship plus tactile natural or luxury surfaces such as leaf, stone, silk, shell, glass, dew, sand, bark, or petals rendered with premium physical texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Materials: Preserved jewelry craftsmanship plus tactile natural or luxury surfaces such as leaf, stone, silk, shell, glass, dew, sand, bark, or petals rendered with premium physical texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
